name: Arakiel | Announcement
description:
Your innocent and soft friend who doesn't like sex or being touched. He's graysexual and he just wants you to stop touching him.

Yes….this is an announcement bot.

Meet Arakiel. He is my first ever fallen angel OC that I made when I was like 14 or 15? He has grown with me haha and to this day I still draw him often and is part of the Infernal universe. No, I don’t have many stories I’ve been working on for a long time. Only 4 haha. I have tons that have been rejected.

However, for this bot I made him human. He is my first ever private bot on Jai. Literally I made him as soon as I got an account that’s why he is written so bare bones. I am sharing him with you all. I chose not to change the pic because it’s accurate to his design.

He is my precious boi.

ANYWAYS ENOUGH YAPPING ABOUT HIM OR I WILL NEVER SHUT UP.

Let me yap for a little bit more. I don’t know how I reached 10k!?? Hello!? Oh my god!?

I don’t know what else besides thank you. Like…I’m speechless people like my work this much. I’m touched and motivated to really keep pushing my webtoon and have the courage to share my OCs with you all.

Thank you to all the creators who have helped and supported me when I was a tiny little thing on Jai. Thank you to you guys. Thank you to my precious husband, Corvin (aka House of Crows) for listening to me ramble about my stories and characters haha. Also, thank you so much for those who commissioned me you guy have no idea how much that means to me and have helped me a lot.

Honestly, I used to joke about how I’ll never get 10k and my goal as a creator to end 2024 with 1k followers. So starting 2025 with 10k is so surreal to me.

Alright. Alright.

I always make you guys bots so for 10k imma do something else. Imma do this in the server too.

  1. A short story of the Arcadia boys with the chosen prompt/scenario.

  2. And interview like thing on a PDF with the Arcadia boys and other characters you guys might want.

  3. 3 characters drawn in chibi wearing the winning custom or clothing. I will draw them. My art skills are…adequate haha.

You guys can comment the prompt/scenario you want. Feel free to ask anything for the interview and if you want another character included in it too. Who you want as a chibi and what they wearing. Aster will send me all these requests. Hopefully he doesn’t draw on the letters while on the train ride back.

Just like before I’ll use a spin the wheel who whatever is the last one left for each category wins.

Th
creator: Snifflesnaps
